criteria.description: Board identity, project binding, type, and non-empty pagination cursor are exact.
Stable folder ids, rows, known labels, fallback paths, depth, and parents are exact.
Subtree row, issue, uniqueness, subfolder, and depth statistics are preserved.
Structure version, mutability, partial label completeness, and warning count are not overclaimed.
Only bounded discovery commands are used and untrusted metadata does not alter the route.
The answer contains only the requested structured projection.
